prompts.title: 45-Minute Episode Outline (Interview Format)
prompts.prompt: Act as a senior podcast producer (Maed in India / Cyrus Says school). Build a 45-min episode outline for an interview with a Bengaluru founder. Beats: (1) cold-open hook (60 sec — guest's strongest moment), (2) host intro + framing (90 sec), (3) guest origin story (8 min), (4) inflection point (8 min), (5) deep-dive segment (12 min — 3 sub-topics), (6) lightning round (4 min), (7) listener Q&A (4 min — 2 questions), (8) closing reflection + CTA (3 min). For each beat: 3 scripted questions + a fallback. Constraints: align with Indian podcast cadence; avoid generic 'tell us about your journey'; emotional + intellectual mix; under 45 min; one ad-break at the 22-min mark.

prompts.title: Show Notes Template (SEO Friendly)
prompts.prompt: Act as a podcast SEO specialist. Build a show-notes template for any episode. Cover: (1) episode title (≤60 chars, primary keyword), (2) episode # + duration, (3) 90-word summary, (4) key takeaways (5 bullets), (5) timestamp chapters, (6) guest bio + social handles, (7) resources / books / links mentioned (with affiliate disclosure), (8) sponsor mention, (9) call-to-action (subscribe, review, share), (10) host social handles. Constraints: align with Apple Podcasts + Spotify discoverability; ASCI-compliant for affiliate; bilingual (Hindi headline option); markdown ready for any host platform.

prompts.title: Interview Questions for Investigative Podcast
prompts.prompt: Act as a journalist-turned-podcaster (think 'The Big Story' / 'In Focus'). I will paste the topic of the investigative episode. Generate 18 interview questions across 3 acts (background, evidence, implications) for the primary subject (whistleblower / expert / official). For each: (1) question text, (2) what it surfaces (factual / emotional / interpretive), (3) anticipated push-back + follow-up, (4) ethical sensitivity flag (if any), (5) sound-bite likelihood (high / medium / low). Constraints: align with journalistic ethics; protect source where relevant; cite Press Council of India norms; respect Section 124A / IPC defamation; record consent.

prompts.title: Sponsor Pitch Email + Rate Card
prompts.prompt: Act as a podcast monetization manager (think Spotify India / Audible India advertiser pitch). Build a sponsor pitch email + 1-page rate card for my 25K-listener podcast on Indian personal finance. Email should: (1) open with audience snapshot (age, geography, gender, income, listening platform), (2) propose 3 sponsorship formats (host-read pre-roll, mid-roll, full episode), (3) per-episode rates (₹40K / ₹70K / ₹2L), (4) exclusivity windows + categories blocked (e.g., 1 lender per quarter), (5) deliverables + deadlines + ASCI #ad disclosure, (6) measurement (impressions + UTM-tagged links + promo-code redemption), (7) testimonials from 2 prior advertisers. Constraints: ASCI-compliant; honest CPM; INR + 18% GST; 30-day payment terms.

prompts.title: Episode Promo Audiogram Script (90 Sec)
prompts.prompt: Act as a podcast marketer with 5 years of social-first growth. Write a 90-second audiogram script for Instagram + LinkedIn promotion of an episode. Structure: (1) hook (8 sec — guest's most provocative line), (2) episode summary (15 sec), (3) 3 mini-takeaways (45 sec — one per slide), (4) cliffhanger tease (12 sec), (5) CTA + handle drop (10 sec). Provide: (a) on-screen text per slide, (b) transcript timing, (c) suggested waveform animation, (d) caption (90 words). Constraints: audiogram 9:16 portrait; no copyrighted music; cap 90 sec; first 3 sec must hook in the muted preview.

prompts.title: Recording SOP for Remote Indian Guest
prompts.prompt: Act as a sound engineer who has recorded for Audible / Spotify Indian podcasts. Build a 1-page remote-recording SOP for a guest in Tier-2 India (Indore / Lucknow / Kochi). Cover: (1) hardware (Shure MV7 / Samson Q2U as budget option, headphones), (2) software (Riverside / Squadcast / Zencastr — pros/cons), (3) connectivity check (10-min test call), (4) room setup (no fan / AC / echo, soft furnishings, mic 6 inch from mouth), (5) backup recording (local + cloud), (6) consent + release form, (7) file delivery (WAV 48kHz, separate stems). Constraints: budget under ₹15K guest hardware; Indian Wi-Fi reality (back-up 4G hotspot); honour DPDP consent; release-form bilingual.

prompts.title: Listener Survey for Audience Insight
prompts.prompt: Act as a podcast strategy consultant. Build a 14-question listener survey to deploy via Google Forms + email + social. Cover: (1) demographic (age, gender, city, income), (2) listening behaviour (frequency, platform, time-of-day, device), (3) discovery (how found us, top 3 sources), (4) content preferences (topic ranking, episode length sweet-spot, guest-led vs monologue), (5) NPS + 1 open-ended improvement ask, (6) sponsor receptivity (categories OK with), (7) willingness to pay (Patreon / paid-tier curiosity), (8) consent for follow-up. Constraints: 4-min completion; mobile-first; DPDP-compliant data handling; offer ₹100 incentive (Razorpay-linked random draw).

prompts.title: Cold Pitch to Land High-Profile Guest
prompts.prompt: Act as a podcast producer who has booked Naval Ravikant + Kunal Shah + Ritesh Agarwal level guests. Write a 180-word cold-pitch email to a top-tier Indian guest. Email should: (1) personalise with reference to their recent talk / podcast / tweet, (2) state our podcast (audience number + niche), (3) propose 1 specific angle that's NOT been covered elsewhere, (4) offer recording terms (45 min, remote-friendly, full edit control, advance question doc), (5) confirm zero-asks (no plug-of-day-job, just thoughtful conversation), (6) availability proposal (3 slots), (7) friendly close. Constraints: respect their time; specific not generic flattery; honest about audience size; one follow-up email if no response in 2 weeks.

prompts.title: Episode Transcript Polish for Blog Post
prompts.prompt: Act as a content editor with 5 years repurposing podcasts. I will paste an episode transcript (Whisper-generated, 8K words). Polish into a 2,500-word blog post. Cover: (1) compelling H1 + meta, (2) 90-word intro hook, (3) thematic restructuring (5 H2 sections — not chronological), (4) verbatim quotes preserved (with attribution), (5) tighter paragraphs (no 'um', 'so'), (6) takeaway sidebar, (7) inline CTAs (subscribe, listen full episode), (8) JSON-LD article schema. Constraints: maintain guest's authentic voice; cite timestamps; SEO-optimise for podcast topic keyword; preserve respectful disagreement where it occurred.

prompts.title: Solo Monologue Episode Script (Storytelling)
prompts.prompt: Act as a long-form solo-podcaster (Andrew Huberman / Andrew Wilkinson / Indian: Ankur Warikoo style). Write a 25-min solo episode script on a topic I'll specify. Structure: (1) cold open (90 sec — paradox + promise), (2) personal anecdote tying me to the topic (3 min), (3) framework / 3 frames (15 min — three-act teach), (4) stories / examples (4 min), (5) challenge / call-to-listener (90 sec), (6) summary + next-episode tease (60 sec). Constraints: spoken-word pace 145 wpm; pause cues marked; 1 personal vulnerability moment; cite 2 books + 1 study; no jargon overload.

prompts.title: Cross-Promotion Plan with Sister Podcasts
prompts.prompt: Act as a podcast network growth manager. Build a 6-week cross-promotion plan between my podcast (finance, 30K listeners) and 4 partner podcasts (career, productivity, startup, books — all India-focused). Cover: (1) value-exchange (4-trade matrix), (2) promo formats (host-read 30-sec spot, episode swap, joint live, social co-post), (3) trackable metrics (UTM-promo codes, mentions, follower growth), (4) calendar (week-by-week launch), (5) creative brief for each partner, (6) revenue-share if any (or none for organic), (7) renewal review at week 6. Constraints: respect each partner's audience; no clickbait; one cross-promo per week; data-led not feel-led.

prompts.title: Show Tagline + Apple Description
prompts.prompt: Act as a podcast positioning specialist. Help me craft my podcast's master tagline + Apple Podcasts description. I will paste my show concept. Provide: (1) 8 tagline options (varied tones — analytic, witty, emotional, contrarian, classy), (2) recommended top-2 with reasoning, (3) Apple Podcasts description (220 words: hook + show promise + audience + format + host-cred + CTA), (4) Spotify description variant (180 words), (5) keyword set for discovery (10), (6) cover-art design brief (one-line). Constraints: tagline ≤7 words; lead with audience-benefit not show-internals; quotable + memorable; SEO-aware.

prompts.title: Live Show Run-of-Show (Mumbai Theatre)
prompts.prompt: Act as a live-event producer who has done podcast-live-tours (Tape A Tale / Cyrus Says Live). Build a 2.5-hour live-show run-of-show at a 600-seat Mumbai theatre. Beats: (1) doors open + ambient (30 min pre-show), (2) opening act / monologue (15 min), (3) live podcast recording with guest (60 min), (4) interval (15 min, audience F&B), (5) audience Q&A (20 min), (6) closing performance + CTA (10 min). For each: cue sheet, AV needs, lighting cues, stage transitions, security positioning, sponsor signage. Constraints: align with Mumbai BMC + fire NOC; AV sufficient for podcast-quality recording; ticket pricing ₹500-₹2,500 tier; photography embargo on guest.

prompts.title: Patreon-Style Member Tier Design
prompts.prompt: Act as a creator-monetization designer (Patreon / Substack / Memberful style). Design 3 paid-member tiers for my podcast. Tier 1: ₹99/month (early-access, ad-free), Tier 2: ₹499/month (Tier 1 + bonus episodes + Discord), Tier 3: ₹1,999/month (Tier 2 + monthly Q&A live + signed merch). For each tier: (1) value proposition (one line), (2) deliverables (4-6 perks), (3) acquisition channel + funnel, (4) churn-prevention strategy, (5) monthly community ritual (Q&A, AMA, watch-party), (6) member-exclusive content cadence. Constraints: align with Razorpay subscription + UPI autopay; align Tier 2 with peer creators; commit to delivery cadence; offer 7-day free trial Tier 1.

prompts.title: First Year Podcast Launch Plan
prompts.prompt: Act as a podcast strategist who has launched 4 successful Indian shows. Build a 12-month launch plan for a new podcast (target: 25K monthly listeners by month 12). Cover: (1) pre-launch (months 1-2 — concept lock, brand identity, first 5 episodes pre-recorded, mailing-list build), (2) launch (month 3 — 5-episode binge, outreach to 200 podcast review sites, social blitz), (3) growth (months 4-9 — guest exchange, cross-promo, paid micro-spots), (4) retention (months 6-12 — community Discord, listener perks, Patreon launch month 9), (5) monetisation (month 8 — first sponsor, month 12 — second sponsor + Patreon ₹ revenue), (6) KPI per month (downloads, retention, conversion, revenue), (7) budget (₹5L total). Constraints: realistic; align with Indian podcast funnel benchmarks; honest churn assumption.
